name: Skyline Furniture Parsons Counter Height Barstool
description: Perfect for adding to a kitchen counter, this Parsons Print Counter Stool adds a bold touch to your decor. This elegant patterned stool features a hardwood construction for long-lasting use, while padding on the seat and back ensures you remain comfortable while seated. The stool features a printed upholstered design for a look you're sure to love. With four sturdy square legs for stability, this wood counter stool will make a great addition to any table or counter.
